titles.text: Kids Station: Hello Kitty no Ouchi he Oide yo!
キッズステーションハローキティのおうちへおいでよ！

descriptions.text: Hello Kitty no o-Uchi he o-Ide yo! is a collection of 30 mini-games where the players can learn about Kitty's house, cooking, painting, design clothes, play games in the park, play with Kitty's pet, etc.
Players can learn about Kitty's house, cooking, painting, design clothes, play games in the park, play with Kitty's pet, etc.
